body.title: Skills into memory graph (theigors/skills palace echo) — kills the ~/.claude/skills + lab/claudecode/cc_skills + ClaudeAndAkien drift
body.result: Migrated 19 active skills to clan.memories as PROCEDURAL rows under SKILLS_ROOT. Palace pointers at theigors/skills/<name>. Synced active → cc_skills (8 drifted updated, 2 new created) so cc_skills stays fully-populated as bootstrap SOT for fresh boxes. Stale cc_skills entries (audit/filter/igor/notethat/probe/slate/slateclose/sprint-minion) left in place per ticket scope; prune is separate ticket.
body.description:
Today skills live in THREE places with drift:
1. ~/.claude/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md — the ACTIVE copy Claude reads
2. lab/claudecode/cc_skills/<skill>/SKILL.md — TheIgors-repo templates (versioned in git)
3. dev/src/ClaudeAndAkien/skills/<skill>.md — separate repo (case study material)

The audit rename sprint earlier showed how painful this drift is — 3 files per skill, manually kept in sync, easy to forget one.

## Proposed shape
- Each skill = memory row: memory_type=PROCEDURAL (habit_type='skill'), parent_id=<skills-root>, metadata has frontmatter fields (name, description, model, model_exception); payload.cells or a text body field holds the SKILL.md markdown
- theigors/skills palace subtree as index
- ALL THREE on-disk locations become echoes, rendered on every skill update
- Optional: a Claude Code startup hook reads from DB and regenerates ~/.claude/skills/ on session start (so Claude always sees fresh)

## Blocked by
- T-palace-as-source-of-truth

## Not in scope
- Decisions about which skills to merge/delete (those are findings from audit, separate)

## ACCEPTANCE ADDITION 2026-04-20 (Akien)

Fresh-box bootstrap via the superclaude launcher must work on akienasus + akienpi (new Linux boxes coming online soon). Two implications:

1. lab/claudecode/cc_skills/* stays in repo and stays fully-populated as a git-resident skill set. superclaude on first-boot copies (or symlinks) from repo into ~/.claude/skills/ without needing palace access.
2. Palace-to-~/.claude/skills/ regeneration is an additional layer, not a replacement. The repo-resident set remains the bootstrap source of truth for fresh boxes.
